titles.text: ストリートファイター リアルバトル オン フィルム

descriptions.text:
Next-generation gaming and mega movie-based action collide in Street Fighter: The Movie!

Street Fighter: The Movie. The ultimate street fighter begins...where the others left off!!!

Street Fighter: The Movie  is a 1995 fighting game developed and published by Capcom for the PlayStation and Sega Saturn, with the game serving as a North American launch title for the PlayStation. The game is based on the 1994 film Street Fighter, itself based on the fighting game series of the same name, and uses digitized images of the film's cast as the characters. While it shares its title with the arcade game Street Fighter: The Movie, the home version is not a port but a similar game developed on the same premise. The game was a commercial success but a critical failure, receiving negative reviews from critics.
